---
title: Seeed Studio XIAO ESP32C3
description: A compact development board with Wi-Fi and Bluetooth connectivity.
---

# Seeed Studio XIAO ESP32C3

## Key Features

- Supply voltage: 5 volts
- Interface: Wi-Fi and Bluetooth

## Technical Specifications

| Parameter | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Dimensions | 21 x 17.8 millimeters |
| Processor | ESP32-C3 |

## Hardware Description

- Connector: USB Type-C

## Pins

| Pin | Function |
| --- | --- |
| D4 | SDA |
| D5 | SCL |

## How to Use

Connect the board over USB and select it in the Arduino IDE.

## Documents

- [Datasheet](https://files.seeedstudio.com/wiki/XIAO_WiFi/esp32-c3_datasheet.pdf)
